starting: *GLAURGHH* *GLAURGHHHHHHHH*
How was my greeting? I'll be blob-hurt if you told me its--- *GLAURGH* ---bage.
I saw these reviews by NobleChadwick33 on Kelp. That you made him a drink so fantastic he quit his desk job...
...to pursue his love for juggling.
Regardless... I'm feeling like a sloshy blob-potato after doomscrolling for a whole week nonstop.
I need a potion that can fix my *GLAURGH* -ness
And also a nice slice of lime to reclaim my globble youth.
neutral: *GLOURGH* This drink doesn't slush me well...
The brew didn't cure much of my sluggishness...
Other than questioning your *GLOURGH* potion making skills.
satisfied: *Happy GLORGH* WOW! My jiggleness feels INCREDIBLE like if I was a little globble.
My jelly feels so stable! I can finally shoot out coins right out of my snoot!
I'm inviting my sewer complex blobs to gobble here! Thank you MageTender!
angry: *Angry GLOARGH* WHAT THE SLIME IS THIS!?!
YOU THINK I'M SORT OF A RECYCLING SLOSH-BIN HUH!?!

starting: *GLAURGHH* *GLAURGHHHHHHHH*
Please, I need your help!!!
My *GLAURGHH* feels too high and must go down after going to a Blobs Night Out!
Also, my Kelp account got locked after guessing a blobzillion tries and I'm now a sad blobby.
neutral: *GLOURGH* This drink doesn't make me go blobby and slushy...
I'm florping out of here! To gobble some trash behind this tavern
That will surely get my mood up.
satisfied: *Happy GLORGH* WOW! My jiggleness is back to how I remembered.
My jelly belly feel so mello!
I thank you again MageTender! I'll get my sewer complex blobs here soon!
angry: *Angry GLOARGH* THIS POTION IS SOME STRAIGHT SLOGFLORP!!!
I AM NOT YOUR DECOMPOSING COMPOST BIN YOU GLOOPY ORGANISM!!!
I'LL PARALYZE YOUR ARMS TO STOP BEING MISTREATED HERE!!!

starting: Hello my dearest MageTender! It is I, the most prettiest Unicorn in town, Anita Caberneigh.
What's that? You haven't heard of me?
Dearest me, it seems like I have encountered a slog brain individual here.
That is also NOT your invitation to talk back at me.
Anyway, from my marvelous list of orders, I demand a potion that makes me grounded and calm.
Especially after YOUR pitiful insult and questioning MY recognition!
Oh, and also, with a cherry on top of my beautiful potion.
neutral: Hmph. It seems like the vibes lacks any form of knowledge and craftmanship.
Clearly you must be hired by someones favorite for your sorrow pitiness.
Something that I would understand and OBVIOUSLY not you.
Farewell, until next time you improve that slog brain of yours.
satisfied: WOAH! This drink... I feel so... tranquil.
Like if I'm dancing on rainbows while my fairies liftsss my fabulous maneeee.
Wh-whyyyy... was I mad... and surely I didn't tip... you to secure my wealth?
Whatever, I'm too prosperous! Farewell until next time MageTender!
angry: WH-WHA?!? WHAT THE IMP IS THIS!?!
MY BLOOD PRESSURE IS EXPLODING WITH RAGE!!!
BECAUSE THAT STUPID PATHETIC BRAIN OF YOURS CAN'T MAKE A PROPER DRINK!!!
YOUR SLOG BRAIN WILL PAY FOR YOUR ATROCIOUS WAYS!!!

starting: Hello my dearest MageTender! It is I, once again, the most prettiest Unicorn in town, Anita Caberneigh!
Was that a magnificent grand entrance? Hush now, you know it was OH SO WELL!
From Anita's marvelous list of orders, I demand a grounded and calm brew to my liking.
With the most finest ripped cherry for my glamorous potion.
And also, when you are done, you must slowly bow to me after handling my precious drink.
neutral: Hmh! This drink only gave me a slight horse-kick to my mood.
Wait no, I need a more insulting phrase for you lots...
Yeah, like a weak donkey-kick. And you also look like one too.
Hush now! Take it in while you watch me scoff at you as Anita walks out of this taven!
satisfied: WOAH! The tranquility of this drink is suchhhh a fabbbulous unicorn-kick!
Like kicking a leprechaun out of its pot-of-gold, knowing that is all YOURSES TO KEEP!
Not... how I became richhh... from those naysayerrrrrs...
Whatever, my thoughts feel so freeeee. Work for me sooooon, MageTender!
angry: WH-WHA?!? WHAT IN THE UNICORN FART IS THIS DRINK!?!
MY SUNSHINE AND RAINBOWS ARE RUINED!!!
YOU SHALL PAY FOR YOUR DIMWITTY WAYS!!!

starting: Hey, fellow MageTender! I'll just get the usua---ZOINKIES!!!
An Earthling!?! I thought you species are extinct now.
Not ever since we, the Martian Martial Arts vaporized your home planet into oblivion.
BZZZZOHH!!! You don't seem thrilled!
Regardless, I need a nice grounded and elevated brew.
With a mini umbrella on top of my potion.
To get us a little bit more 'down to Earth' between the two of us. Hehe, see what I did there?
neutral: Huh, this drink doesn't fully capture my senses.
I know capturing Earthlings is not as hard as capturing the right balance of taste.
Here is you potion back. Don't think I'm done annihilating you Earthlings.
satisfied: ZOINKYS! This is just amazing! This is the good stuff!
It feels like I am gracefully letting these Earthlings capture me back to my home planet!
I'll have to let all the Glorplings know of this tavern, MageTender!
angry: WHAT IN THE E.T. DID YOU BZZZZOHH ME!?!
THIS TASTE LIKE CARBON POLLUTANTS YOU EARTHLINGS DISPEL ON MY HOME PLANET!!!
DUEL ME RIGHT NOW!!! YOU'LL LEARN WHY I HOLD THE TITLE OF ARES AFTER I ZOINK YOU!!!

starting: WAZZZZ good my Earthling! Hopefully your day is as zorp-ing as mine!
Anyway, can you make a grounded and elevated brew?
With an umbrella on top of my potion?
Something to blast my zorp-mind into full levitation!
neutral: Huh, this drink doesn't capture what I am hoping for.
Knawing Unicorn Horns provides stronger zoomies than this... brew...
I better see an improvement when I come back, little Earthling.
satisfied: ZOINKS! The taste gives me the zoomies I need!
It feels like I am levitating into a dreamlike planet! Where life on Mars was fully healed!
You have served me well MageTender! Until next time.
angry: WHAT IN THE C.O.2 IS THIS!?! THIS EVEN TASTE LIKE C.O.2!!!
NO WONDER I BZZZZOHH YOU EARTHLING ON WHAT YOU DONE!!!
PREPARE TO BE ZOINK AGAINST THE ARES!!!
